title: malleostemon roseus
intro: Malleostemon roseus, also known as Rose Malleostemon, is a small, flowering plant native to Western Australia. It is a shrub-like plant used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, colds, and sore throats, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Malleostemon roseus include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
